contract.goal: jelly plan <slug-or-topic> --plan-file --interview-file --manifest-file=<json> --template-file [--no-commit] scaffolds a jelly project: files PLAN.md + INTERVIEW.md, writes manifest.toml (from JSON via U2's lib), instantiates the jelly-guild CLAUDE.md template → projects/<slug>/CLAUDE.md, idempotently registers the project's @-line in the repo-root CLAUDE.md (accumulate), and commits. Whole verb, all 5 concerns (operator decision).
acceptance_criteria: PLAN.md + INTERVIEW.md: copies the two files; collision check on PLAN.md (committed→refuse plan-exists-committed; uncommitted→overwrite); source-file-not-found checks (input-file-not-found).

manifest.toml: reads --manifest-file JSON {title,status,config:{base_branch,substrate},phases:[{number,milestone,name,depends_on}],context?,conventions?}, builds JellyManifest (derives schema_version=1, slug, started, plan_file/research_file/adr_log references), writes via stringifyManifest. Invalid JSON/shape → manifest-input-invalid.

CLAUDE.md instantiation: reads --template-file, fills {{PROJECT_TITLE}}/{{PROJECT_SLUG}}/{{PROJECT_CONTEXT}}/{{PROJECT_CONVENTIONS}} (context/conventions from JSON or a TODO default), writes projects/<slug>/CLAUDE.md. Remaining {{...}} → template-placeholder-unfilled.

Repo-root @-line (accumulate, idempotent): ensures @projects/<slug>/CLAUDE.md in a managed block (<!-- jelly:projects --> ... <!-- /jelly:projects -->); creates file if absent, appends block if file lacks it, adds line if block lacks slug, no-op if present; never touches other projects' lines.
Commit [jelly plan] <slug> over the written files unless --no-commit. Emits {slug, path, manifest_path, project_claude_md, root_claude_md_updated, committed}.
Wired into jelly.ts (plan stops being not-implemented); jelly.test.ts moves plan out of UNWIRED.
cli/verbs/plan.test.ts covers all 5 concerns + the exported helpers; npm test passes.
rules_applied: PLAN.md § Phase 1.3 (plan verb: PLAN.md + INTERVIEW.md + manifest.toml + CLAUDE.md template + @-line) + § Decisions (no events log).
Operator decisions this unit: whole verb (all 5 in one unit); --manifest-file JSON source; accumulate-idempotent @-line.
RESEARCH.md § Phase 1.1 follow-up (@-import is the propagation mechanism; jelly plan manages the @-line).
U2's manifest.ts (stringifyManifest + JellyManifest), U3's lib/{git,project,types}.ts, loom's plan.ts (structural ref minus loom-adopt).
Panel: dropped the auto-derived evaluator-react-api (documented Node-.ts mis-derivation). Ran contract-fit + test-unit + naming.
disqualifiers: Hardcoding a cross-plugin path to jelly-guild's template (use --template-file; cross-plugin resolution is fragile per the guild-spec-path memory).
Swapping/removing other projects' @-lines (accumulate-only per the operator decision; swap is a deferred session-switch concern).
Writing events.jsonl or config.json (jelly's config lives in manifest.toml [config]; no event log).
inputs: projects/2026-05-25-jelly/PLAN.md § Phase 1.3 + § Decisions; RESEARCH.md § Phase 1.1 follow-up.

actions: Wrote cli/verbs/plan.ts (~360 lines): planVerb orchestrating the 5 concerns, with three focused helpers — buildManifestFromInput (parse + validate the JSON, derive the fixed manifest fields, return JellyManifest + context/conventions), instantiateTemplate (exported; fill {{PLACEHOLDER}}s, throw template-placeholder-unfilled on any leftover), ensureRootClaudeMdImport (exported; manage the @-line in the repo-root CLAUDE.md — create/append/insert/no-op, accumulate-only, idempotent, returns whether it changed).

Key ordering: the manifest + template are built + validated BEFORE any mkdir/write, and the PLAN.md collision check precedes both, so an invalid manifest JSON or an unfilled-placeholder template fails clean with no half-created project dir (asserted by tests that check the project dir was NOT created on those error paths).
Wired jelly.ts: imported PLAN_VERBS; VERBS_BY_NAMESPACE now has research + plan.

Updated jelly.test.ts: UNWIRED_NAMESPACES = [revise, adr]; introduced WIRED_NAMESPACES = [research, plan] with a routes-to-verb test.each; updated the no-gaps tripwire to [...UNWIRED, ...WIRED]; switched the node-entry not-implemented smoke from plan (now wired) to revise (still unwired).

Wrote cli/verbs/plan.test.ts (22 tests): happy path across all 5 concerns (incl manifest.toml parseManifest round-trip + the no-events/no-config discipline + 5 staged paths), @-line management (create/append/idempotent/accumulate at both verb + direct-helper level), argument + input validation (missing-args, input-file-not-found, manifest-input-invalid ×2 with no-dir-created assertion, template-placeholder-unfilled with no-dir-created, plan-exists-committed), and direct unit tests for instantiateTemplate + ensureRootClaudeMdImport.

Self-caught: after wiring plan, two jelly.test.ts tests went stale (the no-gaps tripwire counted only research as wired; the node-entry not-implemented smoke used plan). The tripwire FIRED in the combined run — exactly its designed job — and both were fixed (WIRED includes plan; smoke switched to revise). Suite green after.

Verified: npm test → 1067 passed across 72 files. E2E smoke via the bin (jelly plan e2e-demo ... --no-commit) produced a valid manifest.toml (parseManifest round-trips), a placeholder-filled project CLAUDE.md, and a repo-root CLAUDE.md with the managed block + @-line. Panel (contract-fit + test-unit + naming): all three approved on first run. Dropped evaluator-react-api (documented Node-.ts mis-derivation).
corrections: Self-caught stale-test fix: wiring plan into the registry made two jelly.test.ts tests stale (the no-gaps tripwire and the node-entry not-implemented smoke, both of which assumed plan was unwired). The tripwire test fired in the combined suite run; both were updated (WIRED_NAMESPACES now includes plan; the smoke uses revise). Not a scope deviation — the tripwire working as designed.

changes_since_previous: Fourth unit of Phase 1.3 and the heaviest verb. The first consumer of U2's manifest lib (writes manifest.toml via stringifyManifest), the first instantiation of the Phase 1.2 U5 CLAUDE.md template, and the first writer of the repo-root @-line (the Phase 1.1 propagation mechanism made operational). Composes on U3's shared git/slug/types libs. Carries lagged pr-opened event for PR #61 in events.jsonl.
notes_for_pr: The heaviest verb of Phase 1.3 — operator chose to keep all 5 concerns in one unit (revisitable if it grew unreviewable; it didn't). It's the convergence point: first consumer of U2's TOML manifest lib, first instantiation of Phase 1.2 U5's CLAUDE.md template, and the first writer of the repo-root @-line (Phase 1.1's propagation mechanism, now operational).

Three operator decisions shaped it (all grilled before building): (1) whole verb in one unit; (2) manifest data from a --manifest-file JSON (jelly plan derives the fixed fields, validates via U2's JellyManifest shape, stringifyManifest's to TOML); (3) the repo-root @-line is ACCUMULATE + idempotent (adds this project's line to a managed block, never removes others). The template comment's 'only the active project's posture is loaded' swap behavior is explicitly deferred to a future session-switch mechanism — plan is additive so planning project B never silently breaks project A's posture.

Cross-plugin template resolution avoided: jelly-loom (the CLI) takes the jelly-guild template path via --template-file rather than hardcoding a path into jelly-guild's install location (cross-plugin resolution is fragile per memory feedback_loom_pr_opened_orphan_and_guild_spec_path). The caller (jelly-run orchestration in Phase 2.1, or the operator) provides the path.

Fail-before-write: manifest build + template instantiation + collision check all happen before any mkdir/write, so invalid input fails clean with no half-created project dir (asserted on the manifest-input-invalid + template-placeholder-unfilled paths).

Self-caught tripwire fire: wiring plan made two jelly.test.ts tests stale (the no-gaps tripwire + the node-entry not-implemented smoke, both assuming plan unwired). The tripwire fired in the combined run — exactly what it's for — and both were fixed. Recorded as a correction.

Advisory from contract-fit (non-gating): the unfilled-placeholder guard regex /{{[A-Z_]+}}/ only catches uppercase/underscore placeholders; a {{lowercase}} placeholder would slip through unfilled. Acceptable — the template is the project's own controlled artifact and the jelly-guild template (U5) uses SCREAMING_SNAKE placeholders exclusively. A future template author should know the guard's shape; a v2 could broaden to /{{[^}]+}}/.

Advisory from naming (non-gating, file-local): topicWasSlug reads as past-tense for a present-tense predicate (topicIsSlug truer). Left as-is — it's a deliberate mirror of loom's research.ts/plan.ts (and jelly's own research.ts U3) for cross-substrate consistency; not on the public surface.
Substrate-state carry-over: lagged pr-opened event for PR #61 in events.jsonl.

U5 (jelly revise --target=plan|research) is next — replaces PLAN.md or RESEARCH.md + appends to a revision log. Lighter than plan; reuses the git/slug libs. After that U6 (adr) + U7 (MCP) close Phase 1.3.
